allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/docs" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; $r.StatusCode } catch { "No hay servidor en puerto 8000" })
PowerShell(if \($?\) { "Railway CLI instalado" } else { "Railway CLI no instalado" })
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('Sintaxis OK'\)")
